title: euonymus baekdusanensis
intro: Euonymus baekdusanensis, also known as Baekdu spindle tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Korea, to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal preparations, Euonymus baekdusanensis is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
